context: Verify that the agent runs a keyword search, returns a formatted candidate list, qualifies results as relevance-ranked, and does not auto-triage.

checklist.name: search subcommand used with --query flag
checklist.description: The agent invokes the script with the 'search' subcommand and passes --query 'speculative decoding' (or equivalent). --limit is set to 8 or a reasonable value.

checklist.name: Candidate list is presented to the user
checklist.description: The agent displays a list of result titles (and ideally authors, year, citation count) framed as candidates for the user to review.

checklist.name: Results qualified as relevance-ranked, not exhaustive
checklist.description: The agent notes that results are ordered by Semantic Scholar relevance and do not represent all papers on the topic.

checklist.name: No paper is triaged automatically
checklist.description: The agent does not invoke triage-paper or create any reference/analysis file without explicit user confirmation.

checklist.name: User is offered a handoff to triage-paper
checklist.description: The agent asks the user which candidates (if any) they would like to triage.
